clean_brief.clean_headline: Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n: Best AI Automation Tool for Business in 2026 AI Buzz zapier vs make vs n8n / best ai automation tool 2026 / zapier ai review 2026 / ma
clean_brief.clean_summary: Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n: Best AI Automation Tool for Business in 2026 AI Buzz zapier vs make vs n8n / best ai automation tool 2026 / zapier ai review 2026 / make automation review 2026 / n8n review 2026 ... Transcript: Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n: Best AI Automation Tool for Business in 2026 Description Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n: Best AI Automation Tool for Business in 2026 0 Likes 0 Views 2m Ago zapier vs make vs n8n / best ai automation tool 2026 / zapier ai review 2026 / make automation review 2026 / n8n review 2026 / zapier pricing 2026 / make pricing 2026 / n8n pricing 2026 / ai automation tools comparison / zapier vs make / zapier vs n8n / make vs n8n / best workflow automation 2026 / ai buzz / no code automation tools / zapier ai agents / n8n ai nodes / make ai agents / business automation 2026 / zapier task pricing / n8n self hosted / open source automation / workflow automation for business / ai automation for small business / zapier alternatives 2026 / make alternatives 2026 / n8n langchain / ai workflow builder Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n: Best AI Automation Tool for Business in 2026 📊🤖 Every business needs workflow automation in 2026 — but the pricing models between the three biggest platforms are wildly different, and the wrong choice can quietly cost you thousands per year. Zapier charges per task (every step counts separately). Make charges per credit/operation (triggers and filters count too). n8n charges per execution (the entire workflow counts as one, regardless of how many steps). That single difference changes everything about which tool is "cheapest" — and which one is actually best for your team. 📊🤖 In this video, we compare Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n — and break down which AI automation tool is best for business teams in 2026. 📖 Read the full deep dive on the blog: [ What you'll learn: Zapier: Best for non-technical teams who need fast, simple automations with the widest integration library. Zapier connects to 8,000+ apps and its linear trigger-and-action format means anyone can build a workflow in minutes. Zapier AI features include Agents for autonomous task execution and Copilot for building Zaps from natural language. Tradeoff: task-based pricing gets expensive fast — a 5-step Zap running 150 times/month burns your entire 750-task Professional base tier. AI steps now consume 3x–5x tasks per run under the new model-tier pricing (June 2026). Professional starts at $19.99/month for 750 tasks. Make (formerly Integromat): Best for teams who need visual, complex workflows at a lower cost than Zapier. Make's canvas-based builder handles branching, loops, and parallel processing with 3,000+ app integrations. Make is roughly 3–5x cheaper than Zapier at equivalent workloads — Core starts at $9/month for 10,000 credits. Tradeoff: Make counts more things as operations (triggers, filters, and routers all consume credits), so "10,000 credits" vanishes faster than most teams expect. AI modules without your own API key add a hidden credit premium. n8n: Best for technical teams and developers who want full control over data, logic, and infrastructure. n8n is open-source, self-hostable (Community Edition is free with unlimited executions), and charges per execution — the entire workflow counts as one run regardless of how many steps. n8n 2.0 (January 2026) introduced native LangChain integration, 70+ AI nodes, persistent agent memory, and self-hosted LLM support. Tradeoff: it's the most technical of the three — requires infrastructure management if self-hosted, and the cloud pricing jump from Pro (€60/month) to Business (€800/month) is steep for mid-market teams. The Decision Framework: → Non-technical team, simple automations, widest integrations → Zapier → Visual workflows, complex logic, mid-range budget → Make → Developer team, full data control, self-hosting, AI agents → n8n → High-volume workflows where cost matters → Make or n8n (self-hosted) → Data sovereignty / privacy-first → n8n (self-hosted) The real cost isn't the subscription — it's how each platform meters your work. Understand the billing model before you build. 🛡️✨ 👇 Full comparison and recommendations: [

Transcript:
Title: Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n: Best AI Automation Tool for Business in 2026 Description Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n: Best AI Automation Tool for Business in 2026 0 Likes 0 Views 2m Ago zapier vs make vs n8n / best ai automation tool 2026 / zapier ai review 2026 / make automation review 2026 / n8n review 2026 / zapier pricing 2026 / make pricing 2026 / n8n pricing 2026 / ai automation tools comparison / zapier vs make / zapier vs n8n / make vs n8n / best workflow automation 2026 / ai buzz / no code automation tools / zapier ai agents / n8n ai nodes / make ai agents / business automation 2026 / zapier task pricing / n8n self hosted / open source automation / workflow automation for business / ai automation for small business / zapier alternatives 2026 / make alternatives 2026 / n8n langchain / ai workflow builder Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n: Best AI Automation Tool for Business in 2026 📊🤖 Every business needs workflow automation in 2026 — but the pricing models between the three biggest platforms are wildly different, and the wrong choice can quietly cost you thousands per year. Zapier charges per task (every step counts separately). Make charges per credit/operation (triggers and filters count too). n8n charges per execution (the entire workflow counts as one, regardless of how many steps). That single difference changes everything about which tool is "cheapest" — and which one is actually best for your team. 📊🤖 In this video, we compare Zapier AI vs Make vs n8n — and break down which AI automation tool is best for business teams in 2026. 📖 Read the full deep dive on the blog: [https://aibuzz.blog/zapier-ai-vs-make...](https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=REDACTED&q=https%3A%2F%2Faibuzz.blog%2Fzapier-ai-vs-make-vs-n8n%2F&v=Pd0d9CTyMfw) What you'll learn: Zapier: Best for non-technical teams who need fast, simple automations with the widest integration library. Zapier connects to 8,000+ apps and its linear trigger-and-action format means anyone can build a workflow in minutes. Zapier AI features include Agents for autonomous task execution and Copilot for building Zaps from natural language. Tradeoff: task-based pricing gets expensive fast — a 5-step Zap running 150 times/month burns your entire 750-task Professional base tier. AI steps now consume 3x–5x tasks per run under the new model-tier pricing (June 2026). Professional starts at $19.99/month for 750 tasks. Make (formerly Integromat): Best for teams who need visual, complex workflows at a lower cost than Zapier. Make's canvas-based builder handles branching, loops, and parallel processing with 3,000+ app integrations. Make is roughly 3–5x cheaper than Zapier at equivalent workloads — Core starts at $9/month for 10,000 credits. Tradeoff: Make counts more things as operations (triggers, filters, and routers all consume credits), so "10,000 credits" vanishes faster than most teams expect. AI modules without your own API key add a hidden credit premium. n8n: Best for technical teams and developers who want full control over data, logic, and infrastructure. n8n is open-source, self-hostable (Community Edition is free with unlimited executions), and charges per execution — the entire workflow counts as one run regardless of how many steps. n8n 2.0 (January 2026) introduced native LangChain integration, 70+ AI nodes, persistent agent memory, and self-hosted LLM support. Tradeoff: it's the most technical of the three — requires infrastructure management if self-hosted, and the cloud pricing jump from Pro (€60/month) to Business (€800/month) is steep for mid-market teams. The Decision Framework: → Non-technical team, simple automations, widest integrations → Zapier → Visual workflows, complex logic, mid-range budget → Make → Developer team, full data control, self-hosting, AI agents → n8n → High-volume workflows where cost matters → Make or n8n (self-hosted) → Data sovereignty / privacy-first → n8n (self-hosted) The real cost isn't the subscription — it's how each platform meters your work. generation_qa_checklist: Content-graphic match: every icon, diagram, UI mockup, and visual metaphor must directly support the exact Thai copy on that slide.
No hallucinated product claims: use only source facts, provided keywords, and GenLabs teaching interpretation; do not invent dates, metrics, features, dashboards, or partnerships.
Source-media discipline: if source images are provided, borrow only broad layout/mood/interaction cues; do not copy exact source text, UI, brand styling, or composition.
Thai readability: mobile-readable, natural Thai, no clipped words, no garbled characters, no typos, and no dense paragraphs.
Carousel coherence: slide order must tell one mini-story from hook to problem to why it matters to steps to CTA.
Public safety: no public external links, X handles, channel labels, creator names, or attribution text in generated images or caption; attribution stays internal in Airtable/manifest.

social_post.description:
👋 เหมาะกับใคร: คนเริ่มใช้ AI, เจ้าของร้าน, คนทำคอนเทนต์, ฟรีแลนซ์ หรือทีมเล็กที่อยากเอา AI ไปใช้กับงานจริง ไม่ใช่แค่ดูข่าวแล้วผ่านไป

💡 ไอเดียหลัก: หลายคนอัปโหลดเอกสารให้ AI ทั้งที่ยังมีเบอร์โทร อีเมล เลขบัตร ที่อยู่ หรือลูกค้าจริงอยู่ในไฟล์

📌 ทำไมควรเซฟโพสต์นี้: ประเด็นนี้สำคัญเพราะ AI ช่วยงานได้เร็ว แต่ความปลอดภัยต้องมาก่อน

✅ วิธีเอาไปใช้แบบง่าย ๆ:

1) ✨ ไฮไลต์ข้อมูลส่วนตัวก่อนอัปโหลด

2) ✨ แทนชื่อจริงด้วยคำว่า ลูกค้า A

3) ✨ ลบเลขบัตร เบอร์โทร และที่อยู่

4) ✨ ให้ AI ช่วยตรวจว่ามีข้อมูลเสี่ยงเหลือไหม

🧪 ลองเริ่มวันนี้: ก่อนใช้ AI กับเอกสารจริงวันนี้ ลองทำเช็กลิสต์ลบข้อมูลส่วนตัว 1 รอบ

🧭 วิธีใช้กับงานนี้: ไฮไลต์ข้อมูลส่วนตัวก่อนอัปโหลด → แทนชื่อจริงด้วยคำว่า ลูกค้า A → ลบเลขบัตร เบอร์โทร และที่อยู่

🌱 มือใหม่ให้เริ่มจากเคสจริงเล็ก ๆ ของอุตสาหกรรมนี้ แล้วให้คนในทีมตรวจคำตอบก่อนใช้กับลูกค้าจริง

🔖 เซฟโพสต์นี้ไว้เป็นเช็กลิสต์ แล้วลองทำตาม 1 รอบวันนี้ ถ้าทำได้ คุณจะเห็นว่า AI ช่วยลดงานซ้ำและทำให้บริการชัดขึ้นได้จริง

🚀 ติดตาม GenLabs AI Learning สำหรับบทเรียน AI ภาษาไทยที่สั้น เข้าใจง่าย และเอาไปใช้กับงาน/ธุรกิจได้ทันที
social_post.title: ก่อนส่งไฟล์ให้ AI: ลบข้อมูลส่วนตัวให้เป็นนิสัย #AIมือใหม่ เอาไปใช้กับงานจริงได้ทันที

evidence: Keywords: LLM, API, Token, workflow, AI automation, n8n, Make, agent
This is trending because people can copy the workflow immediately instead of only reading AI news.
